name: Get Her Number
description: This tiny website has one simple mission… to steal a smile and maybe your number too 😳📱 No pressure, just a little charm you can’t say no to 💖✨

name: Food Nest
description: A fully functional restaurant and hotel website designed to deliver a seamless user experience. The platform features an interactive homepage, easy room booking system, detailed food menu, and exclusive offers section. Built with a modern design approach, it ensures smooth navigation, responsiveness across devices, and an engaging interface for users.

name: Food Nest Admin Page
description: An admin panel that enables full control over bookings, customer queries, room availability, and offers with a clean and efficient interface.

name: Advance Tic-Tac-Toe
description: A strategy-based Tic Tac Toe game where players relocate their pieces after initial moves. Built with AI support, scoreboard, move tracking, and a modern glass-style interface, making it more challenging and visually appealing than the classic version.

name: Mines & Diamonds
description: *Mines & Diamonds* is a fast-paced risk-and-reward game where you uncover hidden diamonds while avoiding deadly mines. Each safe move boosts your multiplier—but one wrong click ends it all. Test your luck, strategy, and nerve in this thrilling, high-stakes experience.

name: Porshe 911
description: This premium, Next.js-powered scrollytelling experience showcases the Porsche 911 Turbo S. It features a butter-smooth, 240-frame 3D image sequence synchronized to user scroll, accompanied by a dynamic HUD overlay highlighting the car's heritage, exterior design, and blistering performance specs, all wrapped in a sleek, responsive, cinematic aesthetic.
